items.name: D.E.G Steel Carnage Backpack (HRUNTING VARIANT)
items.description:
(DISCLAIMER: This is M.U.I sized, not intended to be worn by itself. Must be worn with full set to have the full look, certain parts must be adjusted like the arms down. Upper body moved forward a little bit, and the lower body moved down a little bit.)

A peculiar piece of history only known to few who have seen it in action. 

While only one variant remains in existence, it was based off data that should've never been recovered. 

Tread lightly around this one.
